title: heyderia decurrens
intro: Heyderia decurrens, also known as the "Wild Pigeonwings", is a flowering plant species in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Heyderia decurrens include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
